items.title: Woods to 'step away and seek treatment' after crash
items.dek: Tiger Woods says he is "stepping away for a period of time to seek treatment and focus on my health" following an arrest after a car crash.
items.body: Tiger Woods says he is "stepping away for a period of time to seek treatment and focus on my health" following an arrest after a car crash.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'You're no longer my sister' - rows erupt as war divides Iranian families
items.dek: People in Iran describe angry scenes and tense relationships as rifts open up over the war.
items.body: People in Iran describe angry scenes and tense relationships as rifts open up over the war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'A million things could go wrong' - why seizing Iran's uranium would be so risky for the US
items.dek: Seizing the stockpile would be one of the "most complicated special operations in history", a former defence official tells the BBC.
items.body: Seizing the stockpile would be one of the "most complicated special operations in history", a former defence official tells the BBC.
